g.title: Every feature module depends on platform + auth. Those edges are elided.

div.p: Convention: every feature module also depends on the foundation layer (platform + auth). Those per-module edges are elided for legibility; only the meaningful feature-to-feature, user, and external-service interactions are drawn. Dashed edges are async / cost / out-of-band.

g.text: run pins a published script version

g.title: Every feature module depends on platform + auth. Those edges are elided.
